page.title: Apps
page.subtitle: Your tenant's apps on LiveKit.
page.onboardBody: Create your first app to start streaming. An app is an isolated space with its own streams, recordings, ingest keys and plugins.
page.onboardStep2: Publish via WebRTC, RTMP, WHIP or a WS camera
page.onboardStep3: Play it back, record it and add plugins

create.title: New app
create.nameHint: Unique identifier. Lowercase, numbers and hyphens.
create.roomPrefixPlaceholder: Optional — derived from the name if omitted
create.errorNameSlug: The name must be a slug: lowercase, numbers and hyphens (no spaces).

delete.title: Delete app
delete.warning: This action removes the app {{name}} and its configuration. It can't be undone.
delete.deleteVods: Also delete VODs and local files
